summary: Updated AskUserQuestion per-choice note display to render only when text exists or the note is actively being edited, without changing stored data or result shape.
filesChanged: extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts - changed per-choice note render condition and removed empty focused placeholder
raw:
## Completed
Polished per-choice note rendering so empty notes no longer show placeholders just because an option is focused/selected. Empty note input still renders while actively editing.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - per-choice note display now uses `hasNote || editing`; removed focused placeholder fallback.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/logic.ts` - added exported `shouldRenderChoiceNote(hasText, editing)` predicate.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh` - added headless assertions for the display predicate.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed locally.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
